title: elaphoglossum boquetense
intro: Elaphoglossum boquetense, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in the Caribbean, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum boquetense include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems are typically used in herbal preparations.
